abstract.text: This type defines the full set of keys on a keyboard and
is also a namespace for layout-related types.

inlineContent.text: A layout also specifies sizes, alignments, etc. which is
required information when rendering a keyboard.
e.g. with the various insert, replace & remove functions.

abstract.text: This article describes the KeyboardKit layout engine.
